Residing most often in forested areas, the '''trompa''' was a shaggy, powerful monster with foot-long claws. The creature's physiology links it to the [[Wampa/Legends|wampa]], to which it appeared to be a distant cousin. Despite its carnivorous urges, the beast did not prove to be a cunning hunter, and trompas randomly attacked whatever creature happened to be closest. The trompa was a very solitary creature, and was mildly intelligent, despite its hunting habits.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 11|''Empire'' 11]] {{Mo}}
*''[[The Game Chambers of Questal]]'' {{Reprint|The Game Chambers of Questal}} {{1st}}
